name: @stoa/analyzer
description: Long-running pipeline service for the Stoa bot. Runs /analyze (multi-agent LLM + Stoa atomic split + trace pin) and /confirm (Stoa split + mocked Limitless trade) past Cloudflare Workers' 30-second cap. Deployed to Railway. The bot Worker enqueues jobs here via HMAC-signed POST; the analyzer DMs results to users via direct Telegram API call.
